scenarios.name: Low Confidence Warning (Expected 200 OK - Manual Review Flag)
scenarios.notes: Extremely high quantity forces ML prediction to drop confidence.

scenarios.name: Rule-Based Fallback (Expected 200 OK - Rule Based)
scenarios.notes: Name-based query triggers validation but operates normally, utilizing rule based if it lacks sufficient ML historicals.

scenarios.name: Invalid Input Missing Quantity (Expected 422 Unprocessable Entity)
Uncostable Item Lacking Recipe (Expected 404 Not Found)
scenarios.notes: Items that do not have any ingredients in the master or recipe database will fail cost calculations safely.
